baseline.observed: returned JSON with scanned_prompt_count 1, returned_prompt_count 0, and repair_count 0

observed_weaknesses: The CLI accepted an explicit repair count of zero.
The command scanned prompts but returned a successful no-op repair result.

selected_candidate.name: CLI positive repair count enforcement
selected_candidate.reason: Make explicit repair count requests meaningful while preserving the existing max-count cap.
selected_candidate.success_metric: repair --count 0 exits non-zero; repair --count 1 still exits 0.

safety_controls: The change is limited to promptvault-cli.rs.
The repair max-count cap remains unchanged.
A valid repair count smoke test was rerun.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
